_note: Pre-migration ridgeline error fingerprints. Captured at the surfaces ridgeline emits today (stderr text + trajectory event kind), not as thrown error class names — pre-migration code uses plain Error throws and regex-based FATAL_PATTERNS classification, not typed error classes. Phase 8 (Cleanup) will re-snapshot user-facing messages and assert byte equality after the substrate swap.

adversarial_round_cap_exhaustion.name: Error
adversarial_round_cap_exhaustion.trigger: phase.sequence.runPhase exits the while-loop after maxRetries+1 unsuccessful build/review cycles
adversarial_round_cap_exhaustion.exit_path: runPhase returns 'failed' (no thrown error); the per-phase result propagates to the caller which decides whether to halt the build
post_message_recovery_text: 1. Edit spec.md and re-run: ridgeline plan <build> && ridgeline build <build>
3. Resume after manual fixes: ridgeline build <buildName>

schema_validation_failure.name: Error
schema_validation_failure.trigger: ensemble.exec.invokeEnsemble synthesizer output does not contain a valid JSON object
schema_validation_failure.message: No valid JSON object found in output
schema_validation_failure.propagation: thrown out of invokeEnsemble; surfaces as a build/review error and is classified by classifyError() as 'transient' under pre-migration regex matching

auth_failure.name: Error
auth_failure.trigger: claude.exec invocation surfaces an authentication-failure substring in the error message
auth_failure.exit_path: handleInvokeError returns 'fatal'; runPhase returns 'failed' immediately, no retry

budget_exceeded.name: Error
budget_exceeded.trigger_a: phase.sequence.isBudgetExceeded(): cumulative cost exceeds config.maxBudgetUsd after a build attempt
budget_exceeded.trigger_b: ensemble.exec.invokeEnsemble: pre-synth cost already exceeds budget
budget_exceeded.thrown_message_template_b: Pre-synthesis cost ($<total>.<##>) already exceeds budget ($<cap>.<##>). Skipping synthesis to avoid further cost.
budget_exceeded.trigger_c: build.ts post-wave check: cumulative budget exceeded between waves
budget_exceeded.exit_path: build halts; phase status updated to 'failed'
